text:
With your class

9. Come to consensus around how to represent magnetic fields for attractive and repulsive forces between a magnet and a coil of wire. As your classmates share their models, make these marks:

  • If something is similar, place a small check mark ( ✓) near what is similar on your own model.
  • If something is different, place a question mark (?) near what is different on your own model.
